name: Helios Energy Ltd
description: Helios Energy Ltd is an Australia-based oil and gas exploration company. The Company is focused on the exploration and development of its flagship Presidio Oil Project located in Presidio County, Texas, USA. Helios Energy holds a significant acreage position in the project, targeting the oil-rich Ojinaga Shale Formation. The company aims to identify and develop commercial oil and gas resources through systematic drilling and production testing programs.
